help.title: Site Guide
help.subtitle: A complete walkthrough of every section of the Birmingham Iranian Political Association site — only the parts relevant to your account are shown below.
help.guest_note: These sections are available to everyone, including visitors who haven't signed in.
help.member_note: Sign in to unlock these features.
help.admin_note: These sections are only visible to staff members with the matching permissions.

home.title: Home Page
home.desc: The landing page introduces the Birmingham Iranian Political Association, shows live statistics (members, total contributions, current balance) and highlights recent posts.

posts.title: Posts
posts.desc: Browse news and announcements published by the group. Open a post to read the full text, view its images, and read approved comments from other members.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.desc: A transparent, public log of how the group's funds are spent — each entry shows the amount, date, description and who withdrew it.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.desc: Support the group financially. Choose an amount and payment method (manual bank transfer or PayPal), and optionally upload a receipt for review.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: Send a message to the group's administrators directly through the site, or use the published email/phone if available.

auth.title: Register & Login
auth.desc: Create an account to unlock member features such as commenting and contributing. Existing members can sign in from the Login page.

comment.title: Commenting
comment.desc: Signed-in members (and guests, where allowed) can leave a comment and rating on posts. Comments are reviewed by moderators before they appear publicly.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.desc: View and update your personal information, change your password, and see your group membership and permissions.

logout.title: Logging Out
logout.desc: Use the profile menu in the navigation bar to securely sign out of your account on this device.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: An overview of the group's financial health, member statistics, and recent activity — contributions, expenses, posts and pending comments at a glance.

members.title: Member Management
members.desc: View, search, and manage every registered member: edit their details, assign them to access groups, activate/deactivate accounts, or remove members. Members with the narrower "Can View Member Details" permission can browse the list and open a member's full profile — comments, contributions, contact messages and activity — without being able to edit or manage anything.

groups.title: Access Groups
groups.desc: Create and manage permission groups. Each group bundles a set of permissions (e.g. who can post, approve comments, or view the balance) and can be assigned to members.

balance.title: Contributions & Expenses (Admin)
balance.desc: Review and manage every contribution and expense record, verify payment receipts, and update statuses.

manage_posts.title: Post Management
manage_posts.desc: Create, edit, publish and delete posts, and manage their images.

manage_comments.title: Comment Moderation
manage_comments.desc: Review pending comments, approve the appropriate ones, filter by status or content type, and remove inappropriate comments.

payments.title: Payment Review
payments.desc: Inspect incoming contributions, verify uploaded receipts, and confirm or reject manual payments.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.desc: Configure site-wide defaults such as the default currency, visibility rules, and other global options.

activity_log.title: Activity Log
activity_log.desc: A searchable, filterable history of actions performed by members across the platform — logins, posts, approvals, and more.

contact_messages.title: Contact Messages
contact_messages.desc: Review messages submitted through the Contact Us form and mark them as handled once resolved, so admins don't duplicate follow-up work.

system_log.title: System Log
system_log.desc: Low-level system events and diagnostics, visible to superusers only.

contributions_public.title: Contributors
contributions_public.desc: A public page listing everyone who has chosen to be shown after their contribution is approved, along with their optional message.

my_contributions.title: My Contributions
my_contributions.desc: See the status of every contribution you've made, including the total approved so far and the reason for any that were rejected.

my_comments.title: My Comments
my_comments.desc: See the status of every comment you've posted, edit or delete them, and view the reason for any that were rejected.

my_messages.title: My Messages
my_messages.desc: See every message you've sent through the Contact Us form and whether it has been handled. You can have at most 4 unresolved messages at a time.

errors.not_found_msg: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.forbidden_msg: You do not have permission to view this page.
errors.unavailable_msg: This section is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

footer.copyright: Birmingham Iranian Political Association. All rights reserved.
footer.dedication: This site was made in memory of Iran's eternal heroes, by arta

common.lightbox_hint: Click outside or press Esc to close
common.deactivated_message: Your account has been deactivated by an admin. Please contact the admins for more information.
